mainEntity.name: How much does a new roof cost in Northern Ohio?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary based on roof size, materials, and structure. We offer free inspections and detailed estimates so you know exactly what to expect, with no surprises.

mainEntity.name: Do you offer financing for roofing projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we provide flexible financing options, including zero-down and low monthly payments. We help you find a plan that fits your budget.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to replace a roof?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most residential roof replacements are completed in 1 to 2 days, weather permitting. We provide a clear timeline upfront and stick to it.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with insurance claims for storm damage?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we assist with inspections, documentation, and communication with your insurance adjuster to make the process smooth and stress-free.

mainEntity.name: What roofing materials do you offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: We specialize in asphalt shingles and rubber roofing (EPDM), both excellent options for durability and weather resistance in Ohio's climate.

mainEntity.name: Do you provide roofing services near me?

acceptedAnswer.text: We serve Huron, Erie County, Sandusky County, Ottawa County, and surrounding Northern Ohio communities. Contact us to confirm service availability in your area.

Real feedback from homeowners across Northern Ohio who trust Horvath Roofing Inc. for honest service, quality workmanship, and lasting results. As a 5-star rated roofing company, we’re proud to serve Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties with the kind of care that keeps customers coming back again and again.
4.7 Over 235 Reviews 
Anthony Mussell
★★★★★
2 days ago
Quinton was extremely helpful. He explained the project clearly and we knew what to expect. Workers were very thorough and cleaned up the property when the project was finished. Quinton followed up with us to make sure everything was to our satisfaction. We would recommend this company to others! 
Oni Farnsworth
★★★★★
a week ago
I had the pleasure of working with John and Angie over at Horvath and they are awesome! So kind and so fun to work with. Their team is amazing and does wonderful work! 
Marc Pierce
★★★★★
2 months ago
Highly recommend, they did the work on our place by the lake that gets blasted by the weather and we couldn't be happier. Thank you. 
John Wheeler
★★★★★
2 months ago
Had a 30 foot valley repaired about 2020. It has held up perfectly. Workmanship and clean up was excellent. Horvath was very quick to react and minimize the interior damage. Recommeded highly. 
Bryan Dail
★★★★★
5 months ago
Earlier this summer, we had some minor repairs made to our roof. Horvath roofing delivered as promised on time, professional, and considerate. This October we discovered what appeared to be a leak in the ceiling of a room upstairs. Horvath came out the next day to inspect only to find we had a Bee infestation! Exterminator came out that day took care of the problem and the next day Horvath came back out to inspect the roof and made sure no further damage was caused. I would highly recommend their services if needed! We greatly appreciate their hard work. 
Linda Miller
★★★★★
6 months ago
Horvath replaced our roof this March. The project manager was great to work with and the roof was done quickly. New gutters and filters, too. Cleanup was great. Would recommend them highly.

★★★★★
6 months ago
The crew worked quickly and efficiently to install my metal roof, also their cleanup left no debris at all!! 
I certainly recommend them!!!

Very nice people and great work crew. Looks beautiful. We were very impressed by how thorough they were and how quickly they got the job done. Would highly recommend!

★★★★★
6 months ago
The ten men that worked on our roof were efficient and thorough. They worked fast and did a beautiful job.

★★★★★
6 months ago
Rest assured, once you call Horvath Roofing, you’re covered with supreme service and product protection. Quinton and Colton took good care to communicate, listen to needs with follow-through, and added a final touch of copper-my favorite! Appalachian Sky is a beautiful choice-the perfect complement to our two-toned sided cottage.The GAF website allows your house photo to simulate a total look-easy to make a color decision. Thank you to your entire team of dedicated roofers! 
Tune Thatpiano
★★★★★
6 months ago
Dan is very professional and explained several options for my chimney issue. Good man. 
John handled all my needs. Highly recommend him and the company. 
Luanne Maschari
★★★★★
6 months ago
Each staff member I spoke with were polite, and friendly. The inspectors who looked at the roof were thorough and knowledgeable. The work done was great. Problem solved. I’ll call them again in the future, if I need roof repairs.

★★★★★

Horvath Roofing installed a couple of new Velux skylights at our home and did a great job. Colton and Jared were great to work with, very attentive to the details and made sure everything was cleaned up and that we were satisfied at completion. Onsite crew were very professional, courteous and dedicated. Would recommend for this type of work.

Locally Owned, Protecting Ohio Homes with Heart Since 1998
Locally Owned, Protecting Ohio Homes with Heart Since 1998
Founded by John Horvath, Horvath Roofing has served Northern Ohio homeowners with honesty and unmatched craftsmanship since 1998. What started as a small-town business has grown into one of the most trusted names among roofing companies in Ohio. For over 26 years, we’ve helped families in Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties feel safe and secure under their roofs.
As a GAF Master Elite® Certified Contractor – an honor earned by less than 2% of roofers nationwide, we bring the highest level of professionalism and protection to every project. But more than that, we’re a locally rooted Ohio roofing company that believes in people over profits.
The Heart of Our Brand
Meet Roofus, our lovable mascot and a daily reminder of the loyalty and care that define who we are. Roofus symbolizes the protection, dependability, and community spirit behind every roof we build. You’ll find him on our logo and even our job sites, reminding us to treat every home like it’s our own.
Through our Adopt-a-Dog program, we help connect local pups with forever homes. It’s one more way we give back to the communities that have trusted us for decades.

Roofing Services Across Northern Ohio
Reliable, Full-Service Roofing, built for local homes, businesses, and Ohio weather.
At Horvath Roofing Inc., we proudly offer expert roofing Ohio homeowners and businesses can trust.
As a leading Ohio roofing company, we serve Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties with a full spectrum of professional roofing and exterior solutions.
Whether you’re protecting a home, managing a property, or improving energy efficiency, our team delivers exceptional results, backed by over 26 years of 5-star service among roofing companies in Ohio.
Our Roofing Services
Protecting your home starts at the top. Our residential roofing services are tailored to Ohio’s climate and include.
Ohio weather can be unpredictable. If your roof has been hit by hail, high winds, or debris, we’ll guide you through the full recovery.
From office buildings to retail spaces, our commercial roofing services are built for durability, efficiency, and low disruption.
We protect your investment with high-performance gutter systems built to manage Ohio weather.
A high-performing roof starts inside. Our attic insulation solutions help you stay energy efficient and protected year-round.
Bring more light into your life with leak-proof, professionally installed skylights.
Why Choose Horvath Roofing Inc.
Don’t keep those roof dreams on a “short leash”
When you choose Horvath Roofing Inc., you’re choosing more than just a contractor. You’re partnering with a local company that’s been putting Ohio families and homes first for over 26 years. From roof repairs in Huron to storm damage roofing in Sandusky, our work is guided by values that prioritize quality, honesty, and community.
5 Core Reasons We’re Northern Ohio’s Most Trusted Roofer:
Integrity You Can Count On 
We do what’s right, not what’s easy. As a GAF Master Elite® Certified Contractor, we deliver transparent quotes, honest recommendations, and roofing solutions that protect your home without the upsell or shortcuts. 
Local Roots, Local Responsibility 
We’re based in Huron, OH, and proudly serve Erie, Sandusky, Ottawa, and Huron Counties. Being local means we’re not just familiar with Ohio’s climate, we’re invested in the families and communities we serve.
Excellence in Every Detail 
We treat every roof like it’s our own. That means using top-grade materials, hiring experienced crews, and never settling for “good enough.” Our craftsmanship has earned us hundreds of 5-star reviews and your neighbors’ repeat business. 
Service With Heart (Meet Roofus) 
Our mascot, Roofus, reminds us daily that loyalty and care go a long way. From our Adopt-a-Dog program to our friendly team, we bring warmth, respect, and responsiveness to every job site. 
Communication That Builds Trust 
No surprises. No confusion. Just clear, honest updates from start to finish. We walk you through every step, offer flexible financing, and make sure you know what’s happening on your roof; every day we’re there. 
Our Work 
Speaks for Itself
See Why Ohio Homeowners Trust Horvath Roofing
From storm-damaged shingles to full roof replacements, we’ve helped hundreds of homeowners across Northern Ohio protect and beautify their homes. Our gallery showcases real projects completed by our expert team.

Our PROCESS
Simple. Transparent. Stress-Free Roofing in Northern Ohio
Here’s how we make roofing easier for homeowners across 
Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties:
At Horvath Roofing Inc., we believe every roofing project should feel straightforward, honest, and low-stress. Whether you’re scheduling a repair, a full roof replacement, or storm damage restoration, our team walks you through each step with clarity and care.
1. Book Your Inspection Now
Your journey starts with a free, no-obligation roof inspection. We assess your roof’s condition, identify issues, and take detailed photos. Whether it’s storm damage, aging materials, or leaks, we’ll find the cause. 
2. Receive a Clear, Honest Estimate
Within 24–48 hours, you’ll receive a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and recommendations. No fine print. No fluff. Just real solutions from a contractor you can trust.
3. Choose Your Materials & Timeline
You pick the roofing system that fits your needs and style. We’ll guide you through color choices, shingle types, and warranty options, then schedule the installation on your timeline.
4. Professional Installation
Our certified crews arrive on time, work efficiently, and clean up thoroughly. From start to finish, we treat your home like it’s our own.
5. Final Walkthrough & Long-Term Support
Before we leave, we inspect the work with you and make sure everything meets your expectations. Plus, we’re here long after installation because the service doesn’t stop when the truck drives away.
Whether it’s your first roof or your forever home, Horvath Roofing makes it easy to protect what matters most, with no surprises, just solutions.
Our Community Outreach in Ohio
Roof Roof Gives Back
At Horvath Roofing, we believe a strong community starts from the top down, and we don’t just mean rooftops. From honoring the veterans who protect us to finding homes for shelter dogs forever, giving back isn’t something we do on the side. It’s at the heart of who we are.
Roofs for Troops
Every year, we donate a brand-new roof to a deserving local veteran. Know someone who served? Nominate them today & add the winners videos.
Adopt a Dog Program
We partner with local shelters and rescues to help dogs find their forever home because every dog deserves a roof over their head, too. See more events & show what you have now

At Horvath Roofing Inc., we believe that quality roofing should be within reach for every homeowner. That’s why we offer flexible roofing financing options and seasonal specials to make your project more affordable, without compromising on quality or service.
Flexible Roofing
Financing Options
Need a new roof, but want to manage costs over time? No problem. We offer:
Low Monthly Payments 
Fast Pre-Approval 
Deferred Payment Plans 
Zero-Down Options Available 
Seasonal
Promotions
We often run limited-time offers throughout the year to help our neighbors in Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties save even more:
Roof Inspections – Always 
$250 Off Full Roof Replacements (select dates only) 
Discounts When You Support Roofus’s Adopt-A-Dog Program 
Whether you’re investing in a full roof replacement, storm damage repairs, or gutter and skylight upgrades, our team can help you find the right payment solution.
Call 419-656-ROOF to learn more about current offers or Schedule Your Inspection now.

Download our free checklist and learn how to spot roofing issues before they become costly repairs.

Roofing Tips, Storm
Updates & Homeowner
Guides for Northern
Ohio
Stay informed with expert roofing advice from the team at Horvath Roofing Inc.. Our blog is packed with seasonal tips, storm recovery guides, and maintenance checklists to help protect your home and your budget.
ASK RooFUS ANYTHING
Got roofing questions? Roofus is here to help! Click to sniff out the answers.
How much does a new roof cost in Northern Ohio? 
Costs vary based on roof size, materials, and structure. We offer free inspections and detailed estimates so you know exactly what to expect, no surprises. 
Do you offer financing for roofing projects? 
Yes! We provide flexible financing options, including zero-down and low monthly payments. We’ll help you find a plan that fits your budget. 
How long does it take to replace a roof? 
Most residential roof replacements are completed in 1–2 days, weather permitting. We’ll give you a timeline upfront and stick to it. 
Can you help with insurance claims for storm damage? 
Absolutely. We assist with inspections, documentation, and communication with your adjuster to make the process smooth and stress-free. 
What roofing materials do you offer? 
We specialize in asphalt shingles and rubber roofing (EPDM)… both excellent options for durability and weather resistance in Ohio’s climate.
Do you provide roofing services near me? 
If you’re in Huron, Erie, Sandusky, or Ottawa County, you’re in our service area. Call us to confirm if we serve your neighborhood! 
Still have questions? Call 419-656-ROOF or Schedule Your Inspection today.

## Locally Owned, Protecting Ohio Homes with Heart Since 1998

![John Horvath owner of roofing company in Ohio](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/john-horvath-owner-roofing-company-ohio.webp "home 33")

## Locally Owned, Protecting Ohio Homes with Heart Since 1998

Founded by **John Horvath**, Horvath Roofing has served Northern Ohio homeowners with honesty and unmatched craftsmanship since 1998. What started as a small-town business has grown into one of the most trusted names among **roofing companies in Ohio**. For over 26 years, we’ve helped families in **Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties** feel safe and secure under their roofs.

**As a GAF Master Elite® Certified Contractor** – an honor earned by less than 2% of roofers nationwide, we bring the highest level of professionalism and protection to every project. But more than that, **we’re a locally rooted Ohio roofing company** that believes in people over profits.

![Horvath Roofing adopt a dog thumbnail image](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-adopt-a-dog-thumbnail.webp "home 34")

The Heart of Our Brand

Meet Roofus, our lovable mascot and a daily reminder of the loyalty and care that define who we are. Roofus symbolizes the **protection, dependability, and community spirit** behind every roof we build. You’ll find him on our logo and even our job sites, reminding us to treat every home like it’s our own.

Through our **Adopt-a-Dog program**, we help connect local pups with forever homes. It’s one more way we give back to the communities that have trusted us for decades.

## Roofing Services Across Northern Ohio

Reliable, Full-Service Roofing, built for local homes, businesses, and Ohio weather.

At Horvath Roofing Inc., we proudly offer expert roofing Ohio homeowners and businesses can trust.

As a leading Ohio roofing company, we serve Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties with a full spectrum of professional roofing and exterior solutions.

Whether you’re protecting a home, managing a property, or improving energy efficiency, our team delivers exceptional results, backed by over 26 years of 5-star service among roofing companies in Ohio.

## Why Choose Horvath Roofing Inc.

Don’t keep those roof dreams on a **“short leash”**

When you choose **Horvath Roofing Inc.,** you’re choosing more than just a contractor. You’re partnering with a local company that’s been putting Ohio families and homes first for over 26 years. From roof repairs in Huron to storm damage roofing in Sandusky, our work is guided by values that prioritize quality, honesty, and community.

5 Core Reasons We’re Northern Ohio’s Most Trusted Roofer:

Integrity You Can Count On

We do what’s right, not what’s easy. As a GAF Master Elite® Certified Contractor, we deliver transparent quotes, honest recommendations, and roofing solutions that protect your home without the upsell or shortcuts. 

Local Roots, Local Responsibility

We’re based in Huron, OH, and proudly serve Erie, Sandusky, Ottawa, and Huron Counties. Being local means we’re not just familiar with Ohio’s climate, we’re invested in the families and communities we serve.

Excellence in Every Detail

We treat every roof like it’s our own. That means using top-grade materials, hiring experienced crews, and never settling for “good enough.” Our craftsmanship has earned us hundreds of 5-star reviews and your neighbors’ repeat business. 

Service With Heart (Meet Roofus)

Our mascot, Roofus, reminds us daily that loyalty and care go a long way. From our Adopt-a-Dog program to our friendly team, we bring warmth, respect, and responsiveness to every job site. 

Communication That Builds Trust

No surprises. No confusion. Just clear, honest updates from start to finish. We walk you through every step, offer flexible financing, and make sure you know what’s happening on your roof; every day we’re there.

## Our PROCESS

Simple. Transparent. Stress-Free Roofing in Northern Ohio

Here’s how we make roofing easier for homeowners across  
**Erie, Huron, Ottawa, and Sandusky Counties:**

At **Horvath Roofing Inc**., we believe every roofing project should feel straightforward, honest, and low-stress. Whether you’re scheduling a repair, a full [roof replacement](https://horvathroofinginc.com/services/roof-replacement/), or storm damage restoration, our team walks you through each step with clarity and care.

![Horvath Roofing inspection process icon](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-inspection-process-icon.webp "home 89")

### 1\. Book Your Inspection Now

Your journey starts with a free, no-obligation roof inspection. We assess your roof’s condition, identify issues, and take detailed photos. Whether it’s storm damage, aging materials, or leaks, we’ll find the cause.

![Horvath Roofing inspection process icon](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-inspection-process-icon.webp "home 89")

### 2\. Receive a Clear, Honest Estimate

Within 24–48 hours, you’ll receive a detailed proposal with transparent pricing and recommendations. No fine print. No fluff. Just real solutions from a contractor you can trust.

![Horvath Roofing inspection process icon](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-inspection-process-icon.webp "home 89")

### 3\. Choose Your Materials & Timeline

You pick the roofing system that fits your needs and style. We’ll guide you through color choices, shingle types, and warranty options, then schedule the installation on your timeline.

![Horvath Roofing inspection process icon](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-inspection-process-icon.webp "home 89")

### 4\. Professional Installation

Our certified crews arrive on time, work efficiently, and clean up thoroughly. From start to finish, we treat your home like it’s our own.

![Horvath Roofing inspection process icon](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-inspection-process-icon.webp "home 89")

### 5\. Final Walkthrough & Long-Term Support

Before we leave, we inspect the work with you and make sure everything meets your expectations. Plus, we’re here long after installation because the service doesn’t stop when the truck drives away.

Whether it’s your first roof or your forever home, Horvath Roofing makes it easy to protect what matters most, with no surprises, just solutions.

## Our Community Outreach in Ohio

Roof Roof Gives Back

At Horvath Roofing, we believe a strong community starts from the top down, and we don’t just mean rooftops. From honoring the veterans who protect us to finding homes for shelter dogs forever, giving back isn’t something we do on the side. It’s at the heart of who we are.

### Roofs for Troops

Every year, we donate a brand-new roof to a deserving local veteran. Know someone who served? [Nominate them today](https://horvathroofinginc.com/roofs-for-troops/) & add the winners videos.

## ASK RooFUS ANYTHING

Got roofing questions? Roofus is here to help! Click to sniff out the answers.

How much does a new roof cost in Northern Ohio?

Costs vary based on roof size, materials, and structure. We offer free inspections and detailed estimates so you know exactly what to expect, no surprises. 

Do you offer financing for roofing projects?

Yes! We provide flexible financing options, including zero-down and low monthly payments. We’ll help you find a plan that fits your budget. 

How long does it take to replace a roof?

Most residential roof replacements are completed in 1–2 days, weather permitting. We’ll give you a timeline upfront and stick to it. 

Can you help with insurance claims for storm damage?

Absolutely. We assist with inspections, documentation, and communication with your adjuster to make the process smooth and stress-free. 

What roofing materials do you offer?

We specialize in asphalt shingles and [rubber roofing](https://horvathroofinginc.com/roof-types/rubber-roofing/) (EPDM)… both excellent options for durability and weather resistance in Ohio’s climate.

Do you provide roofing services near me?

If you’re in Huron, Erie, Sandusky, or Ottawa County, you’re in our service area. Call us to confirm if we serve your neighborhood!

items.text:
About Horvath Roofing | GAF Master Elite
Horvath Roofing Inc. started in 1998, grounded in family values, craftsmanship, and a deep commitment to our community here in Ohio. 
John Horvath founded the company in Huron, Ohio, with the belief that a roofing contractor should be someone you can call back, someone who explains what they found, and someone who does the job the same way whether you are watching or not.
Twenty-seven years later, that is still how we operate.
We are based in Huron. We serve Erie, Huron, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties. We have worked on homes near the Lake Erie shoreline, older homes in Sandusky and Huron, farms and rural properties in Milan and Castalia, and commercial buildings throughout the region. We know what the winters here do to a roof, and we know what it takes to build something that lasts.
Whether you are searching for a dependable team for a small roof repair or a large-scale commercial installation, our mission remains the same. We deliver high-quality, affordable, and honest roofing services with unmatched customer care. Horvath Roofing is more than a roofing company. We are your neighbors, problem-solvers, and partners in protection. Every interaction with our clients is treated as an opportunity to exceed expectations and build trust that lasts.
Our Story is Built on Reliability Since 1998
Horvath Roofing began with a vision to raise the standard of roofing throughout Ohio. From humble beginnings as a local operation to becoming a respected name in the region, we have grown because of our consistent dedication to doing the job right the first time. Our founder saw a gap in the industry where too many companies were cutting corners. We set out to change that.
As a GAF Certified contractor, our team combines top-tier materials with expert craftsmanship. Every member of our company continues our legacy by applying industry-leading techniques with personalized service.

Why Ohio Homeowners Trust Horvath Roofing
When you choose Horvath Roofing, you choose a team that values trust as much as technique. Our clients stay with us because:
We offer honest assessments and detailed estimates
We use high-quality materials from trusted manufacturers
We stand by our work with strong warranties and clear communication
We prioritize safety, cleanliness, and efficiency on every project
We are a GAF Certified contractor recognized for excellence in the roofing industry
Our Skilled and Local Team
Our team is made up of experienced roofing professionals. Each technician, project manager, and customer service representative at Horvath Roofing is chosen for their skill, integrity, and dedication to customer satisfaction.
Training and continued education are part of our culture. We ensure our staff stays current on roofing advancements so you benefit from the latest techniques and best practices.
Giving Back to Ohio Communities
We are proud to be a locally owned and operated company that gives back. Our involvement in Ohio community events, youth programs, and charitable efforts reflects our core belief in uplifting one another.
Our commitment goes beyond roofing. We aim to be a business that residents across Ohio can depend on now and in the future.
What Makes Us Stand Out
Every roofing company can talk about materials and installation. What makes Horvath Roofing different is how we treat our clients. From your first phone call to final cleanup, our process is designed to reduce stress and add value. Here is what sets us apart:
Transparent and timely communication
No-pressure consultations tailored to your needs
Local experienced staff
Flexible scheduling and financing options
Trusted by homeowners across Ohio
GAF Master Elite Contractor
Horvath Roofing is a GAF Master Elite contractor. That is the highest certification available from GAF, North America’s largest roofing manufacturer, and it is held by only about 2 percent of roofing companies in the United States.
Earning Master Elite status takes more than just installing GAF products. It requires:
Verified licensing and insurance documentation
A background check and business standing verification
Ongoing training and certification in GAF installation standards
A customer satisfaction track record that GAF monitors
We have maintained this status because we take it seriously. It is what separates a contractor who says they do good work from one who has been verified to do it.
Careers with Horvath Roofing
If you want to be part of a company that values craftsmanship, integrity, and pride in serving Ohio, consider exploring career opportunities with Horvath Roofing. We offer opportunities for growth, advancement, and learning through hands-on experience and supportive leadership. Joining our team means becoming part of a respected name in roofing that has served Ohio with pride since 1999.
Start Your Roofing Project with Us
Whether you are managing seasonal maintenance or responding to storm damage, we are ready to help. Our experienced team is equipped to assess the condition of your roof and provide timely solutions. We are committed to ensuring every Ohio homeowner feels supported and confident in their roofing choices. Contact Us today to schedule a consultation or request more information.

Horvath Roofing Inc. is the name Ohio homeowners trust when they want to learn more about us and work with a roofing company that values quality, dependability, and community. Our reputation is built on years of consistent results and positive experiences shared by clients across the state. We remain committed to evolving with the needs of Ohio property owners while holding true to the standards that set us apart.

As a locally owned and operated business, we understand the unique needs of homeowners in Ohio and deliver tailored service and fast response.

![Horvath Roofing Ohio team about photo 1](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-ohio-team-about-photo-1.webp "About 5")

## Our Skilled and Local Team

Our team is made up of experienced roofing professionals. Each technician, project manager, and customer service representative at Horvath Roofing is chosen for their skill, integrity, and dedication to customer satisfaction.

Training and continued education are part of our culture. We ensure our staff stays current on roofing advancements so you benefit from the latest techniques and best practices.

![Horvath Roofing Ohio team about photo 2](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-ohio-team-about-photo-2.webp "About 6")

## Giving Back to Ohio Communities

We are proud to be a locally owned and operated company that gives back. Our involvement in Ohio community events, youth programs, and charitable efforts reflects our core belief in uplifting one another.

Our commitment goes beyond roofing. We aim to be a business that residents across Ohio can depend on now and in the future.

## What Makes Us Stand Out

Every roofing company can talk about materials and installation. What makes Horvath Roofing different is how we treat our clients. From your first phone call to final cleanup, our process is designed to reduce stress and add value. Here is what sets us apart:

*   Transparent and timely communication  
    
*   No-pressure consultations tailored to your needs  
    
*   Local experienced staff  
    
*   Flexible scheduling and financing options  
    
*   Trusted by homeowners across Ohio

## GAF Master Elite Contractor

Horvath Roofing is a GAF Master Elite contractor. That is the highest certification available from GAF, North America’s largest roofing manufacturer, and it is held by only about 2 percent of roofing companies in the United States.

Earning Master Elite status takes more than just installing GAF products. It requires:

*   Verified licensing and insurance documentation
*   A background check and business standing verification
*   Ongoing training and certification in GAF installation standards
*   A customer satisfaction track record that GAF monitors

We have maintained this status because we take it seriously. It is what separates a contractor who says they do good work from one who has been verified to do it.

![master-elite-logo](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/master-elite-logo.webp "About 7")

## Careers with Horvath Roofing

If you want to be part of a company that values craftsmanship, integrity, and pride in serving Ohio, consider exploring [career opportunities](https://horvathroofinginc.com/hiring) with Horvath Roofing. We offer opportunities for growth, advancement, and learning through hands-on experience and supportive leadership. Joining our team means becoming part of a respected name in roofing that has served Ohio with pride since 1999.

## Start Your Roofing Project with Us

Whether you are managing seasonal maintenance or responding to storm damage, we are ready to help. Our experienced team is equipped to assess the condition of your roof and provide timely solutions. We are committed to ensuring every Ohio homeowner feels supported and confident in their roofing choices. [Contact Us](https://horvathroofinginc.com/contact-us/) today to schedule a consultation or request more information.

## Experience the Horvath Roofing Difference

Horvath Roofing Inc. is the name Ohio homeowners trust when they want to learn more about us and work with a roofing company that values quality, dependability, and community. Our reputation is built on years of consistent results and positive experiences shared by clients across the state. We remain committed to evolving with the needs of Ohio property owners while holding true to the standards that set us apart.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Horvath Roofing offers a wide range of professional roofing solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of both homeowners and commercial property owners across Ohio.

Horvath Roofing has served Ohio communities since 1999 with a reputation built on quality work and customer satisfaction.

Horvath Roofing is a GAF Certified contractor, which reflects our commitment to professional standards and trusted service.

As a locally owned and operated business, we understand the unique needs of homeowners in Ohio and deliver tailored service and fast response.

[Contact Us](https://horvathroofinginc.com/contact-us/) to learn more about our services or schedule an appointment with our team.

![map-car-img](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/map-car-img.webp "About 9")

## Proudly Serving Homeowners Across Northern Ohio

At **Horvath Roofing Inc.**, we’re proud to serve the communities we call home. With deep local roots and over 26 years of experience, our team provides trusted roofing services throughout **Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties.**

Looking for a **roofing contractor near you?** If you’re located in or around these counties, we’ve likely completed a project just down the street.

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely, we are happy to meet with you to evaluate your roofing needs, answer your questions, and provide clear recommendations based on your property.

Meet the Horvath Roofing Team
Meet the Roofing Experts behind every successful project at Horvath Roofing. Our skilled, dedicated team is committed to excellence, from the first inspection to the final walkthrough. With years of hands-on experience, safety expertise, and craftsmanship, our professionals deliver trusted results. Whether you need a roof replacement, maintenance support, or a consultation with a commercial roofing expert, we have the people to guide you.
We are proud to serve homeowners and businesses across Ohio with reliable, quality-driven service. As a GAF Certified company with roots in the community since 1999, Horvath Roofing has built a reputation based on transparency, long-term performance, and professional relationships. Our team reflects those values in every project we complete. 
What Sets Our Roofing Experts Apart 
The Horvath Roofing team isn’t just trained, we’re deeply invested in doing things right. Here’s why our roofing experts continue to earn the trust of clients throughout Ohio: 
Extensive in-field experience with various roofing systems
Regular training to stay current with industry standards
Trained to uphold the highest standards on every roof we step onto
Clear communication and commitment to customer satisfaction
Our roofing experts understand that your home or business deserves more than a quick fix; it deserves long-lasting protection from people who care. That’s why we encourage joining our Roof Care Club, for regular checkups that catch small issues before they become big problems. 
Your Partner in Residential Roofing 
We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Our residential roofing experts listen carefully to your concerns and tailor their recommendations based on the specific needs of your home, offering flexible roof financing options to make upgrades manageable without added stress. Whether it’s aging shingles, ventilation issues, or storm damage, we approach each roof with the care and knowledge it deserves. 
Full-service support from inspection to installation
Recommendations backed by decades of hands-on experience
Family-friendly crews who respect your space and time
Every member of our team understands the value of your investment and treats your home like their own.
Northern Ohio’s Most
Trusted Roofer
Where Every Roof Has a Story
Whether you’re facing storm damage, planning a new roof, or just need expert advice, Horvath Roofing Inc. is here to help.
Need help fast? Call us directly at 419-656-ROOF and speak with our friendly team today.
WE’RE HOWLING TO HEAR FROM YOU, LET’S TALK ROOFING!
Complete the form below, and our team will get in touch to schedule your inspection.
Commercial Roofing Experts You Can Count On 
For business owners and property managers, time and durability matter. That’s why we offer direct access to a qualified commercial roofing expert for every project. No matter what type of building you have, our team is trained and equipped to deliver smart, lasting solutions tailored to your specific structure and business needs. 
Experience with large-scale and multi-structure projects
Efficient inspections and long-term performance planning
Clear documentation for insurance, budgeting, and compliance
If you’re running a business or managing multiple properties, our commercial roofing experts help minimize risk and extend the life of your building. 
Get to Know Our Team Beyond the Tools 
At Horvath Roofing, we believe who you work with matters just as much as the materials you choose. Our team is made up of dependable professionals who value hard work, honesty, and community, which is at the heart of our about us story and our company roots in Ohio.

John Horvath 
President
John started the company in April of 1999 during his first year of teaching high school shop class. After teaching shop class and Construction Foundations classes for 8 years, John decided to leave the teaching profession and focus full-time on Horvath Roofing, Inc.
When John is not working, he enjoys spending time with his two children, traveling the world, and jet skiing.
Ben “Skip” Jenkins
Senior Roof Technician
Skip is highly experienced in the roofing trade and has been with the company for 5 years. His great customer reviews show his work ethic and dedication to customer service. Skip enjoys working outside, building motorized bikes, and skydiving. He is always there if you need a helping hand. 
Angela Schindler
Business Coordinator/Marketing Manager
Angie joined the Horvath Roofing team in 2024 as the Office Administrative Assistant. She has former trade experience in HVAC, plumbing, and excavation, and she is excited to learn the field of roofing! She has an educational background in Business Management and Paralegal Studies, but has found her strengths in customer service and administration work. When she is not working, she enjoys spending time with her family, photography, being outdoors, and fishing! 
Quinton Smith
Roofing Advisor 
Quinton has been in the roofing/construction field for about 12 years now. When not at work, he enjoys spending time with his children, camping, and hiking. 
Colton Slaven 
Production Manager 
Colton Slaven is the Production Supervisor at Horvath Roofing and brings new energy to the team during an exciting period of growth. Originally from Huron, Ohio, Colton is 28 years old and studied at Bowling Green State University. He is a proud Detroit Tigers fan who enjoys spending quality time with his growing family. Outside of work, Colton can often be found exploring trails or spending the day at the park with his kids.
Caden Bumb
Roofing Advisor
Caden is from Willard, he comes to Horvath Roofing from previously being in home improvement and exterior work. He played College baseball for Terra State. He is a Cleveland sports team fan and enjoys playing with his new puppy! He also enjoys hunting and fishing.
Talan England
Canvasser
Talan is from Fremont, he comes to Horvath Roofing from several years of construction first. He enjoys golfing, going to the gym and hanging out with his friends in his free time. He played several sports for school and he loves his two pups at home! 
Dallas
Roofing Advisor
Bringing over 13 years of experience in construction to homeowners throughout Sandusky and surrounding areas.Dallas specializes in roofing, storm damage, and insurance claims as well as full exterior remodeling. He takes pride in making the process simple, efficient, and tailored to each customers needs. Out side of work, Dallas likes to spend time with family at events and gatherings. 
How Our Roofing Experts Ensure a Smooth Experience 
At Horvath Roofing, we believe that great service doesn’t end at installation. Our roofing experts go above and beyond to ensure every step of your roofing journey is handled with care. From your first consultation to the final walkthrough, our team communicates clearly, anticipates challenges, and works with your schedule to minimize disruptions. 
You’ll never be left wondering what comes next. Whether it’s scheduling follow-up maintenance, sharing documentation for your records, or advising on seasonal upkeep, our experts remain a trusted resource long after the job is done. It’s all part of our commitment to doing the job right and being there when you need us. 
Ready to Work With the Roofing Experts Ohio Trusts 
When you choose Horvath Roofing, you’re not just hiring a crew; you’re partnering with true roofing experts who take your project seriously. Whether you need guidance from a residential professional or advice from a commercial roofing expert, our team is here to help. 
Contact us today to learn how our expertise can bring long-term protection and value to your home or business. 
Frequently Asked Questions 
How experienced are your roofing experts? 
Each member of our team has hands-on experience and goes through regular training to stay updated on current roofing standards and practices.
Do you have commercial roofing experts for businesses in Ohio? 
Yes. Our commercial roofing experts specialize in flat roofing systems, code compliance, and long-term maintenance planning for businesses and facilities across Ohio. 
Can I meet with a roofing expert before committing to a project? 
Absolutely. We’re happy to meet with you to evaluate your roofing needs, answer questions, and offer clear recommendations based on your property. 
What types of projects do your experts typically handle? 
Our team is trained to manage everything from single-home replacements to complex multi-building commercial installations.
Are your experts familiar with current roofing technologies? 
Yes. We stay on top of the latest roofing materials, ventilation systems, and weather-resistant designs to provide our customers with the best available options. 
Proudly Serving Homeowners Across Northern Ohio
At Horvath Roofing Inc., we’re proud to serve the communities we call home. With deep local roots and over 26 years of experience, our team provides trusted roofing services throughout Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties.
Looking for a roofing contractor near you? If you’re located in or around these counties, we’ve likely completed a project just down the street.
Call 419-656-ROOF or Book a Inspection to confirm if we serve your area.

# Meet the Horvath Roofing Team

![Horvath Roofing team experts banner in Ohio](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-team-experts-banner-ohio.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 1")

![horvath-roofing-ohio-expert-team-photo](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-ohio-expert-team-photo.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 4")

Meet the Roofing Experts behind every successful project at Horvath Roofing. Our skilled, dedicated team is committed to excellence, from the first inspection to the final walkthrough. With years of hands-on experience, safety expertise, and craftsmanship, our professionals deliver trusted results. Whether you need a [roof replacement](https://horvathroofinginc.com/services/roof-replacement/), maintenance support, or a consultation with a [commercial roofing](https://horvathroofinginc.com/services/commercial-roofing/) expert, we have the people to guide you.

We are proud to serve homeowners and businesses across Ohio with reliable, quality-driven service. As a GAF Certified company with roots in the community since 1999, Horvath Roofing has built a reputation based on transparency, long-term performance, and professional relationships. Our team reflects those values in every project we complete. 

## What Sets Our Roofing Experts Apart

The Horvath Roofing team isn’t just trained, we’re deeply invested in doing things right. Here’s why our roofing experts continue to earn the trust of clients throughout Ohio: 

*   Extensive in-field experience with various roofing systems
*   Regular training to stay current with industry standards
*   Trained to uphold the highest standards on every roof we step onto
*   Clear communication and commitment to customer satisfaction

Our roofing experts understand that your home or business deserves more than a quick fix; it deserves long-lasting protection from people who care. That’s why we encourage joining our [Roof Care Club](https://horvathroofinginc.com/roof-care-club), for regular checkups that catch small issues before they become big problems. 

## Your Partner in Residential Roofing

We don’t believe in one-size-fits-all solutions. Our [residential roofing](https://horvathroofinginc.com/services/residential-roofing/) experts listen carefully to your concerns and tailor their recommendations based on the specific needs of your home, offering flexible [roof financing](https://horvathroofinginc.com/roof-financing/) options to make upgrades manageable without added stress. Whether it’s aging shingles, ventilation issues, or storm damage, we approach each roof with the care and knowledge it deserves. 

*   Full-service support from inspection to installation

*   Recommendations backed by decades of hands-on experience

*   Family-friendly crews who respect your space and time

Every member of our team understands the value of your investment and treats your home like their own.

![roofing-exp-img-1](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/10/roofing-exp-img-1-1-1.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 5")

## Northern Ohio’s Most  
Trusted Roofer

Where Every Roof Has a Story

Whether you’re facing storm damage, planning a new roof, or just need expert advice, Horvath Roofing Inc. is here to help.

Need help fast? Call us directly at [**419-656-ROOF**](tel:4196645934) and speak with our friendly team today.

![form-dog-img](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/form-dog-img.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 6")

WE’RE HOWLING TO HEAR FROM YOU, LET’S TALK ROOFING!

Complete the form below, and our team will get in touch to schedule your inspection.

## Commercial Roofing Experts You Can Count On

For business owners and property managers, time and durability matter. That’s why we offer direct access to a qualified commercial roofing expert for every project. No matter what type of building you have, our team is trained and equipped to deliver smart, lasting solutions tailored to your specific structure and business needs. 

*   Experience with large-scale and multi-structure projects
*   Efficient inspections and long-term performance planning
*   Clear documentation for insurance, budgeting, and compliance

If you’re running a business or managing multiple properties, our commercial roofing experts help minimize risk and extend the life of your building. 

## Get to Know Our Team Beyond the Tools

At Horvath Roofing, we believe who you work with matters just as much as the materials you choose. Our team is made up of dependable professionals who value hard work, honesty, and community, which is at the heart of our [about us](https://horvathroofinginc.com/about-us) story and our company roots in Ohio.

John Horvath

Ben “Skip” Jenkins

Senior Roof Technician

Skip is highly experienced in the roofing trade and has been with the company for 5 years. His great customer reviews show his work ethic and dedication to customer service. Skip enjoys working outside, building motorized bikes, and skydiving. He is always there if you need a helping hand.

![Angelina at Horvath Roofing Ohio team](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-team-angelina-ohio.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 9")

Angela Schindler

Business Coordinator/Marketing Manager

Angie joined the Horvath Roofing team in 2024 as the Office Administrative Assistant. She has former trade experience in HVAC, plumbing, and excavation, and she is excited to learn the field of roofing! She has an educational background in Business Management and Paralegal Studies, but has found her strengths in customer service and administration work. When she is not working, she enjoys spending time with her family, photography, being outdoors, and fishing!

![Horvath Roofing Ohio team photo on site](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-ohio-team-photo-on-site-1.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 10")

Quinton Smith

Roofing Advisor

Quinton has been in the roofing/construction field for about 12 years now. When not at work, he enjoys spending time with his children, camping, and hiking.

![horvath-roofing-ohio-crew-job-site-photo](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-ohio-crew-job-site-photo.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 11")

Colton Slaven

Production Manager

Colton Slaven is the Production Supervisor at Horvath Roofing and brings new energy to the team during an exciting period of growth. Originally from Huron, Ohio, Colton is 28 years old and studied at Bowling Green State University. He is a proud Detroit Tigers fan who enjoys spending quality time with his growing family. Outside of work, Colton can often be found exploring trails or spending the day at the park with his kids.

![Caden Bumb at Horvath Roofing Ohio team](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-team-caden-bumb-ohio.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 12")

Caden Bumb

Roofing Advisor

Caden is from Willard, he comes to Horvath Roofing from previously being in home improvement and exterior work. He played College baseball for Terra State. He is a Cleveland sports team fan and enjoys playing with his new puppy! He also enjoys hunting and fishing.

![Talan England at Horvath Roofing Ohio team](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-team-talan-england-ohio.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 13")

Talan England

Canvasser

Talan is from Fremont, he comes to Horvath Roofing from several years of construction first. He enjoys golfing, going to the gym and hanging out with his friends in his free time. He played several sports for school and he loves his two pups at home!

![Dallas at Horvath Roofing Ohio team](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-team-dallas-ohio.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 14")

Dallas

Roofing Advisor

Bringing over 13 years of experience in construction to homeowners throughout Sandusky and surrounding areas.Dallas specializes in roofing, storm damage, and insurance claims as well as full exterior remodeling. He takes pride in making the process simple, efficient, and tailored to each customers needs. Out side of work, Dallas likes to spend time with family at events and gatherings.

## How Our Roofing Experts Ensure a Smooth Experience

At Horvath Roofing, we believe that great service doesn’t end at installation. Our roofing experts go above and beyond to ensure every step of your roofing journey is handled with care. From your first consultation to the final walkthrough, our team communicates clearly, anticipates challenges, and works with your schedule to minimize disruptions. 

You’ll never be left wondering what comes next. Whether it’s scheduling follow-up maintenance, sharing documentation for your records, or advising on seasonal upkeep, our experts remain a trusted resource long after the job is done. It’s all part of our commitment to doing the job right and being there when you need us. 

## Ready to Work With the Roofing Experts Ohio Trusts

When you choose Horvath Roofing, you’re not just hiring a crew; you’re partnering with true roofing experts who take your project seriously. Whether you need guidance from a residential professional or advice from a commercial roofing expert, our team is here to help. 

Contact us today to learn how our expertise can bring long-term protection and value to your home or business. 

## Frequently Asked Questions

How experienced are your roofing experts?

Each member of our team has hands-on experience and goes through regular training to stay updated on current roofing standards and practices.

Do you have commercial roofing experts for businesses in Ohio?

Yes. Our commercial roofing experts specialize in flat roofing systems, code compliance, and long-term maintenance planning for businesses and facilities across Ohio. 

Can I meet with a roofing expert before committing to a project?

Absolutely. We’re happy to meet with you to evaluate your roofing needs, answer questions, and offer clear recommendations based on your property. 

What types of projects do your experts typically handle?

Our team is trained to manage everything from single-home replacements to complex multi-building commercial installations.

Are your experts familiar with current roofing technologies?

Yes. We stay on top of the latest roofing materials, ventilation systems, and weather-resistant designs to provide our customers with the best available options. 

![map-car-img](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/map-car-img.webp "Meet Our Roofing Experts 15")

## Proudly Serving Homeowners Across Northern Ohio

At **Horvath Roofing Inc.**, we’re proud to serve the communities we call home. With deep local roots and over 26 years of experience, our team provides trusted [roofing services](https://horvathroofinginc.com/services/roofing-services/) throughout **Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties.**

Looking for a **[roofing contractor](https://horvathroofinginc.com/) near you?** If you’re located in or around these counties, we’ve likely completed a project just down the street.

Call **[419-656-ROOF](tel:4196645934)** or Book a Inspection to confirm if we serve your area.

mainEntity.name: What is included in the Roof Care Club membership?

acceptedAnswer.text: Members receive one yearly inspection with a 17-point safety analysis, skylight cleaning, debris removal, discounted repairs, and priority service scheduling.

mainEntity.name: How often do Roof Care Club members get inspections?

acceptedAnswer.text: Each member receives one full annual checkup. However, they may also contact us for discounted follow-up visits as needed.

mainEntity.name: Can I join the Roof Care Club if my roof is already older?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, regardless of age, routine maintenance helps preserve your roof’s remaining lifespan and catch issues before they worsen.

mainEntity.name: Is the Roof Care Club transferable if I sell my home?

acceptedAnswer.text: In some cases, the membership may be transferable. Contact our team to learn about transfer options if you are planning to sell your home.

mainEntity.name: What makes the Roof Care Club different from a warranty?

acceptedAnswer.text: A warranty is reactive, covering issues after they occur. The Roof Care Club is proactive, focusing on regular maintenance to prevent problems before they happen.

items.text:
Roof Care Club in Ohio for Year-Round Roofing Protection
Ohio homeowners know how quickly the seasons can change, and with that, how vulnerable their roofs can become. The Horvath Roof Care Club was created to provide proactive, ongoing maintenance that gives you peace of mind and helps avoid costly repairs down the line. As part of the Roof Care Club, your home will benefit from consistent oversight by trusted local professionals who know what to look for before problems escalate.
This maintenance-focused membership is designed for homeowners who value long-term roof health and want an expert team on their side throughout the year. It’s especially helpful for those who may not have the time or expertise to routinely check for signs of damage. With ongoing care built into your yearly plan, you can avoid surprise expenses and last-minute calls for emergency service.
What Is the Roof Care Club and How Does It Work
The Roof Care Club is Horvath Roofing’s exclusive maintenance membership for homeowners across Ohio. It provides consistent inspections, priority service, and access to member-only savings. Our goal is to catch small issues before they become major repairs.
With one low annual fee, you gain ongoing access to a roofing partner that actively helps preserve the integrity of your home.

Benefits of Being a Roof Care Club Member
When you join the Roof Care Club, you’re not just investing in maintenance; you’re protecting your home, belongings, and budget. 
Members enjoy:
One annual Roof Care Advantage check-up
17-point safety analysis of your roofing system
Skylight cleaning and debris removal
Priority scheduling for repairs and appointments
Discounted diagnostic fee of $19.95
10% off all repairs while your membership is active
Peace of mind knowing your roof is in expert hands
In a state like Ohio, where changing weather conditions can impact roofing materials, these benefits can make a major difference.
Why Preventive Maintenance Matters
Even the most durable roofing materials are susceptible to seasonal wear, wind, and moisture buildup. Without regular inspection, subtle problems like cracked flashing, clogged valleys, or loose shingles may go unnoticed until more serious damage occurs.
Joining the Roof Care Club is a way to prevent those issues. We don’t wait until something breaks; we look for early signs and help extend the lifespan of your roof. It’s a practical solution for homeowners who want to protect their investment over time.
You can learn more about who we are and how our experience since 1999 supports every inspection and recommendation.
Who Should Join the Roof Care Club
This membership is ideal for any Ohio homeowner who wants:
Routine, expert evaluations of their roofing system
Trusted advice backed by decades of experience
Early detection of water damage or structural issues
Fewer emergency repairs over the life of the roof
A simple, budget-friendly way to care for their home
Whether your roof is five or fifteen years old, having a professional check in regularly keeps you a step ahead of the weather.
Beyond the Roof Peace of Mind for Ohio Homeowners
Membership in the Roof Care Club doesn’t just protect your shingles; it protects your schedule, your budget, and your peace of mind. Homeowners who enroll often tell us they feel more in control of their home maintenance and less anxious during storm season or unexpected weather shifts.
No more guessing when the next inspection should happen
Confidence knowing experts are monitoring for hidden issues
Fewer last-minute repair surprises disrupting your routine
A smoother path toward planning future upgrades or repairs
A consistent relationship with a team that knows your roof’s history
It’s more than maintenance, it’s a sense of relief that comes from knowing your home is always being looked after by professionals who genuinely care.
Supported by a Trusted Local Team
When you become a Roof Care Club member, you’re backed by the same dedicated professionals who deliver every Horvath Roofing project. From our roofing technicians to our roofing experts, we approach maintenance with the same care we apply to installations.
Your home becomes part of a prioritized client list, which means you get faster service, clearer updates, and consistent checkups with professionals who already know your roof.
Make Maintenance More Manageable
Roof care shouldn’t feel like a guessing game. That’s why the Roof Care Club simplifies the process with predictable maintenance and smart budget planning.
Membership benefits include:
One annual visit ensures nothing gets overlooked
Reduced costs on repairs add up to major savings
Clear documentation supports the home value during resale
Financing options allow you to spread out costs if needed
Ongoing relationship with professionals who know your roof
Whether you’re planning ahead for upgrades or trying to avoid future disruptions, this membership makes roof care a seamless part of homeownership. With inflation and material costs continuing to rise, smart homeowners across Ohio are looking for ways to protect their homes and their wallets.

The Horvath Roof Care Club was created to provide proactive, ongoing maintenance that gives you peace of mind and helps avoid costly repairs down the line. The Roof Care Club is Horvath Roofing’s exclusive maintenance membership for homeowners across Ohio. It provides consistent inspections, priority service, and access to member-only savings. Our goal is to catch small issues before they become major repairs.

With one low annual fee, you gain ongoing access to a roofing partner that actively helps preserve the integrity of your home.

## Benefits of Being a Roof Care Club Member

When you join the Roof Care Club, you’re not just investing in maintenance; you’re protecting your home, belongings, and budget. 

**Members enjoy:**

*   One annual Roof Care Advantage check-up  
    
*   17-point safety analysis of your roofing system

*   Priority scheduling for repairs and appointments  
    
*   Discounted diagnostic fee of $19.95  
    
*   10% off all repairs while your membership is active  
    
*   Peace of mind knowing your roof is in expert hands

In a state like Ohio, where changing weather conditions can impact roofing materials, these benefits can make a major difference.

## Why Preventive Maintenance Matters

Even the most durable roofing materials are susceptible to seasonal wear, wind, and moisture buildup. Without regular inspection, subtle problems like cracked flashing, clogged valleys, or loose shingles may go unnoticed until more serious damage occurs.

Joining the Roof Care Club is a way to prevent those issues. We don’t wait until something breaks; we look for early signs and help extend the lifespan of your roof. It’s a practical solution for homeowners who want to protect their investment over time.

You can [learn more about who we are](https://horvathroofinginc.com/about-us) and how our experience since 1999 supports every inspection and recommendation.

![horvath-roofing-roof-care-club-benefit-1](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-roof-care-club-benefit-1.webp "Horvath Roof Care Club 5")

## Who Should Join the Roof Care Club

This membership is ideal for any Ohio homeowner who wants:

*   Routine, expert evaluations of their roofing system  
    
*   Trusted advice backed by decades of experience  
    
*   Early detection of water damage or structural issues  
    
*   Fewer emergency repairs over the life of the roof  
    
*   A simple, budget-friendly way to care for their home

Whether your roof is five or fifteen years old, having a professional check in regularly keeps you a step ahead of the weather.

## Beyond the Roof Peace of Mind for Ohio Homeowners

Membership in the Roof Care Club doesn’t just protect your shingles; it protects your schedule, your budget, and your peace of mind. Homeowners who enroll often tell us they feel more in control of their home maintenance and less anxious during storm season or unexpected weather shifts.

*   No more guessing when the next inspection should happen  
    
*   Confidence knowing experts are monitoring for hidden issues  
    
*   Fewer last-minute repair surprises disrupting your routine  
    
*   A smoother path toward planning future upgrades or repairs  
    
*   A consistent relationship with a team that knows your roof’s history

It’s more than maintenance, it’s a sense of relief that comes from knowing your home is always being looked after by professionals who genuinely care.

![Horvath Roofing roof care club benefit image 2](https://horvathroofinginc.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/05/horvath-roofing-roof-care-club-benefit-2.webp "Horvath Roof Care Club 6")

## Supported by a Trusted Local Team

When you become a Roof Care Club member, you’re backed by the same dedicated professionals who deliver every Horvath Roofing project. From our roofing technicians to our [roofing experts](https://horvathroofinginc.com/meet-the-roofing-experts-team), we approach maintenance with the same care we apply to installations.

Your home becomes part of a prioritized client list, which means you get faster service, clearer updates, and consistent checkups with professionals who already know your roof.

## Make Maintenance More Manageable

Roof care shouldn’t feel like a guessing game. That’s why the Roof Care Club simplifies the process with predictable maintenance and smart budget planning.

**Membership benefits include:**

*   One annual visit ensures nothing gets overlooked  
    
*   Reduced costs on repairs add up to major savings  
    
*   Clear documentation supports the home value during resale  
    
*   [Financing options](https://horvathroofinginc.com/roof-financing/) allow you to spread out costs if needed  
    
*   Ongoing relationship with professionals who know your roof

Whether you’re planning ahead for upgrades or trying to avoid future disruptions, this membership makes roof care a seamless part of homeownership. With inflation and material costs continuing to rise, smart homeowners across Ohio are looking for ways to protect their homes and their wallets.

mainEntity.name: What services do you offer for residential roofs in Ohio?

acceptedAnswer.text: We offer roof repair, replacement, installation, inspections, and storm damage restoration for homes across Northern Ohio.

mainEntity.name: Can you repair storm damage quickly?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We offer 24/7 emergency response and can typically begin temporary repairs the same day.

mainEntity.name: What makes your roof replacement service different?

acceptedAnswer.text: We use GAF-certified materials, provide transparent estimates, and back every project with a 25-year warranty.

mainEntity.name: Do you handle commercial roofing systems too?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We provide full commercial roofing services including repairs, replacements, and preventive maintenance.

mainEntity.name: How do you support customers during insurance claims?

acceptedAnswer.text: We document damage, provide detailed estimates, and communicate directly with your insurance adjuster.

items.text:
Our Roofing & Exterior Services
Complete roofing & exterior solutions under one roof. 
BOOK NOW for a FREE service consultation. roofing, gutters, windows & more. 
Service schedules fill fast. book today to get started. 
Complete roofing & exterior solutions under one roof.
BOOK NOW for a FREE service consultation. roofing, gutters, windows & more. 
Service schedules fill fast. book today to get started. 
When it comes to protecting your property, high-quality services are critical. At Horvath Roofing Inc., we provide tailored roofing solutions that match the needs of homes and businesses throughout Ohio. Whether you’re upgrading an aging roof or addressing sudden damage, our team is focused on delivering lasting results. We prioritize personalized attention, ensuring each client receives a plan that fits their goals, budget, and building type.
Our crews combine hands-on experience with modern roofing methods to ensure efficient, clean, and durable installations. Every project is approached with clear communication, organized timelines, and safety as a top priority. We utilize reliable materials chosen specifically for Ohio’s climate and your property’s architecture. Whether it’s routine maintenance or a large-scale replacement, we work to deliver peace of mind with every service call.
Full-Service Solutions for Homes and Businesses
Horvath Roofing proudly delivers a comprehensive range of roofing services tailored to meet the needs of residential and commercial clients across Ohio. No matter the size or scope of your roofing needs, our team provides expert guidance and trusted results backed by decades of experience.
Our roofing services include:
Residential Roofing
Our roof repair service and roof replacement service are designed to restore and protect your home from Ohio’s variable weather. Whether it’s wind, hail, or general aging, we help homeowners maintain strong, beautiful roofs. We offer Roof Repair Service, Roof Replacement Service, New Roof Installation Service, and Roof Inspection Service tailored to the needs of every homeowner. Each of these services is delivered with precision and a focus on long-term protection. From minor leak fixes to full tear-offs and replacements, we approach every job with the same level of care and commitment.
Commercial Roofing
We offer durable and cost-effective commercial roofing systems for businesses of all sizes. Every solution is customized to meet structural needs and long-term performance goals. We help business owners protect their investments with reliable materials and experienced installation. Our commercial services are ideal for offices, retail centers, warehouses, and more. Each installation is backed by a thorough inspection to ensure long-term durability and compliance.
Storm Damage Repairs
Storm damage is unpredictable, which is why we provide rapid emergency services. From emergency tarping to urgent roof repair service, our team acts quickly to prevent further damage and restore security. We’re always ready to support Ohio homeowners and property managers when time matters most. Our emergency services also ensure that any necessary roof replacement service is initiated swiftly to prevent ongoing issues. No matter the extent of the damage, we prioritize restoring the integrity and function of your roof as fast as possible.
Insurance Claims Support
Navigating insurance claims doesn’t need to be stressful. We assist with documentation, inspections, and ongoing communication to help ensure roofing damage is clearly identified and presented. Our team is here to support you throughout the process by supplying the right information and being available to answer questions. We also provide timely updates and follow-up support to keep you informed every step of the way. From start to finish, our focus is on reducing confusion and making the overall experience more manageable for our customers.
Roof Shields
We offer Roof Shield applications to help aging roofs gain added protection and longer life. This treatment strengthens existing shingles, defends against future damage, and improves overall roof durability, without a full replacement. It’s a smart solution for homeowners looking to delay costly replacements while still enhancing roof resilience. The application process is quick and minimally disruptive, making it ideal for busy households or businesses.
Gutter Solutions
Our gutter services include installation and replacement using the best systems available, like FlexxPointPro Gutter Covers and Edgeline Gutter Guards. A properly working gutter system directs water safely away from your foundation and protects your roofing edges from water damage. These advanced gutter protection systems also help minimize clogging and reduce the need for frequent maintenance. Our team ensures each gutter installation is precisely aligned to optimize drainage and long-term performance.
Energy efficiency starts in the attic. Our attic insulation services help regulate temperatures, reduce heating and cooling costs, and protect roofing materials from moisture-related deterioration. Insulation is a smart investment for comfort and roofing longevity. It also supports better indoor air quality by minimizing dust and allergens that can circulate through poorly insulated spaces. Proper attic insulation can even reduce ice dam formation by maintaining consistent roof deck temperatures in winter.
Skylight Installation
Looking to add natural light? Our skylight installations are carefully integrated to maintain roof integrity while enhancing interior spaces. Each unit is sealed and insulated for optimal performance in every season. We proudly install VELUX skylights, known for their quality, energy efficiency, and stylish design. These skylights offer customizable features such as solar-powered blinds and rain sensors to enhance both function and comfort. They also contribute to energy savings by reducing the need for artificial lighting during daylight hours.
Roof Types We Offer
We offer two proven roofing materials designed to meet the needs of Ohio homeowners and businesses.
A reliable and cost-effective option that balances durability, style, and ease of maintenance.
Ideal for flat or low-slope roofs, rubber roofing is flexible, watertight, and built for long-term performance.
These roof types are selected for their performance in Ohio’s climate and their ability to deliver lasting protection with minimal upkeep.
Benefits of Choosing Horvath Roofing’s Services
Ohio property owners choose Horvath Roofing because our services are based on reliability, respect, and results. Every project we take on, whether it’s a simple roof repair service or a complex roof replacement service, is approached with professionalism and care.
Why customers trust our services: 
Over two decades of local roofing experience
GAF Certified status for quality assurance
Clear, timely communication at every step
Proven results and long-term client relationships
Fully customized service options based on property type and condition
We don’t just complete projects, we build trust, value, and satisfaction.
Emergency Roofing Services That Deliver Peace of Mind
Disaster doesn’t wait. Our emergency services include rapid-response tarping, structural assessments, and fast repairs when roofing issues strike unexpectedly. Whether it’s a fallen tree, flying debris, or flashing failure, our team is ready to restore your roof with expert efficiency.
Protect your property quickly and confidently with: 
24/7 availability for urgent calls
On-site safety stabilization
Detailed damage evaluation
Complete follow-up services, including roof repair or roof replacement
When the unexpected happens, Horvath Roofing Inc. is the team you can trust to respond fast and restore your peace of mind.
Serving Ohio with Integrity, One Roof at a Time
We’re proud to serve communities across Ohio with roofing services built on honesty and experience. Whether you’re scheduling preventive maintenance or need a roof replacement service after a storm, our goal is to deliver superior results that support long-term roof health and value.
We’re more than roofers, we’re a team that treats your home or business with the attention it deserves.
Get Started with Services You Can Trust
When you need trusted services for your home or business, Horvath Roofing Inc. is ready to help. From expert roof repair service to complete roof replacement service, our team is dedicated to quality, responsiveness, and results.
Reach out today to schedule your inspection or service visit, and experience the difference true craftsmanship makes across Ohio.
Frequently Asked Questions
We provide comprehensive services, including inspections, emergency repairs, new roof installations, and full roof replacement service tailored to Ohio homeowners.
Yes, we offer fast-response roof repair service for wind, hail, and rain damage. Our emergency team arrives promptly to assess and stabilize your roof.
We use high-quality materials, provide expert installation, and customize our service to your roof’s structure and your goals. Our team ensures each replacement meets durability and appearance standards.
Absolutely. We design and install commercial systems built to last. Our services support a variety of property types, including offices, warehouses, and retail spaces.
We help document damage, communicate with insurers, and provide accurate assessments to streamline the claim process. Our support ensures you’re not left navigating it alone.
Proudly Serving Homeowners Across Northern Ohio
At Horvath Roofing Inc., we’re proud to serve the communities we call home. With deep local roots and over 26 years of experience, our team provides trusted roofing services throughout Huron, Erie, Sandusky, and Ottawa Counties.
Looking for a roofing contractor near you? If you’re located in or around these counties, we’ve likely completed a project just down the street.
Call 419-656-ROOF or Book a Inspection to confirm if we serve your area.
